description: Limit the speed of an AI-driven vehicle or AI person to given value. It has continuous effect and AI will not break through the speed limitation until one is contacted, engaged or regrouped.
examples:
<sqf>
leader player limitSpeed 5;		// set to walking speed
sleep 30;
leader player limitSpeed (2 * getNumber(configOf leader player >> "maxSpeed"));	// remove the limit
</sqf>

<sqf>
addMissionEventHandler ["OnEachFrame", { hintSilent format ["myVehicle's speed: %1 km/h", speed myVehicle toFixed 2] }];
sleep 5;
myVehicle limitSpeed 5;
</sqf>

<sqf>
// it was necessary to use limitSpeed repeatedly before Arma 3 1.24
_this setVariable ["speedLimit", 50];
_this spawn {
	while { sleep 0.1; canMove _this } do
	{
		_this limitSpeed (_this getVariable "speedLimit");
	};
};
sleep 10;
_this setVariable ["speedLimit", 100]; // update the speed limit
</sqf>
name: limitSpeed
problem_notes: Since {{GVI|tkoh|1.00|size= 0.75}} and as of {{GVI|arma3|2.14|size= 0.75}}, using any negative value on a helicopter will not reset the speed limit, but will force it to fly in reverse.

Item.desc: in km/h; By default, it's {{hl|2 * maxSpeed}} of the vehicle/unit (which is defined in config). See Example 1.
Item.name: speed
